name: ai-scientist
description: Cross-host agentic research pipeline (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI). 16 dedicated subagents with per-host model pinning, BFTS tree-search experiments, VLM figure review, slide generation, per-project MemPalace memory (no cross-project leakage), and 9 pre-configured MCP servers (OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, arXiv, bioRxiv, PubMed, Anna's Archive, fetcher, plus the plugin's own knowledge MCP). v2.0.0 introduces a Python orchestrator (mcp/lib/orchestrator/, 17 modules) that owns retries, token tracking, semantic convergence, ensemble reviewers, and stage-gate verification. SKILL.md is now a thin intent router. Bundles canonical Sakana AI-Scientist Python (~10k LOC) for benchmark-faithful runs alongside lightweight host-native agents. Produces LaTeX + Word manuscripts + Beamer slide decks with multimodal figure validation.
